meta.title: Pločica Pula – Handmade Ćevapi at the Pula Market Hall
meta.description: Called top 3 street foods in the world by Michelin-starred chef Jan Hartwig. Two locations in Pula — the Market Hall on Narodni trg and Pločica u Podroomu. Order via WhatsApp: +385 98 173 4718.

product.headline: 90g
product.bodyA: Ground in-house. Seasoned in-house. Fired in-house.
product.bodyB: One piece. Ninety grams. No shortcuts.

cards.body: A recipe that travelled from Bosnia to Pula. Beef and veal, blended by rule.
Market hall and Podroom. Two grills. One Pločica.

place.quote: Never change what made it great.
place.body: We walked into the oldest market in Pula and lit the grill. The meat ages 65 hours, ground and seasoned in-house, fired on a hot grill. A second grill now burns in the old Podroom — a space every Pula local remembers. Two grills. One Pločica.

validation.hartwigQuote: One of the top 3 street foods I've ever eaten.
validation.hartwigAttributionContext: World's 50 Best Explores — filming in Istria
validation.hartwigNote: Came in by chance during the World's 50 Best Explores shoot in Istria. Came back for more.
validation.plavaQuote: Školski točna izvedba. Čisto meso. Bez prečaca.
validation.plavaIntro: Plava Kamenica is Croatia's leading food guide.
validation.plavaSub: Ranked among the best ćevapi in Croatia.

blog.title: From the kitchen
blog.subtitle: What's happening here — Hartwig, Podroom, the recipe.

menu.title: Menu
menu.intro: WhatsApp ahead — your order is ready when you arrive.
menu.note: Prices in EUR. Czech Budweiser has been with us from day one — on tap at the Podroom. Alongside: Istrian wines (Geržinić), local rakijas (Martesi), and a full bar.

order.title: Order
order.location1Tagline: The original. Inside the market hall.
order.location2Tagline: The second grill. In the legendary Podroom.

notFound.title: This page wasn't grilled.
notFound.body: This address doesn't exist. Maybe it went to the grill.
